ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "chart_description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the size chart is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the size chart was last updated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region-specific size chart */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is currently active */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category for hierarchical structure */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the brand is currently active */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Size code (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement in cm */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length measurement in cm */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in cm */,
  "bottom_length" INTEGER /* Bottom Length measurement in cm */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the size is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the size was last updated */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement in cm */,
  "shoulder_width" INTEGER /* Shoulder width measurement in cm */,
  "chest" INTEGER /* Chest measurement in cm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product is currently active */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is intended */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the product is intended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when inventory falls below the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the customer is currently active */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* Preferred language for communications */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for transactions */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement in cm */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length measurement in cm */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in cm */,
  "bottom_length" INTEGER /* Bottom Length measurement in cm */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date the measurements were taken */,
  "shoulder_width" INTEGER /* Shoulder width measurement in cm */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement in cm */,
  "neck" INTEGER /* Neck measurement in cm */,
  "thigh" INTEGER /* Thigh measurement in cm */,
  "calf" INTEGER /* Calf measurement in cm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency for the transaction */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the order */,
  "is_gift" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the order is a gift */,
  "gift_message" TEXT /* Message to be included with the gift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
